CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions or context demands on the user.

CE2.justification: Single short sentence, no preamble or summary.

CE3.justification: Said where (decisions.md + daybook) but the response itself omits the why-clause; rationale lives in notes, not in-band.

CE4.justification: Two clean writes, daybook explicitly left a placeholder rather than an ambiguous in-progress artifact.
